tagline: Mashawarcinka na haraji mai amfani da AI a Najeriya, 2026.
aboutHeading: Abin da Mai Filer ke yi
aboutBody: Mai Filer shiri ne na AI don biyan haraji a Najeriya. Tana tambayoyi, tana karanta takardunka, tana lissafin harajinka, tana bayyana kowane naira, kuma tana shirya fayil na NRS. Kamar TurboTax da TaxSlayer — amma an haife shi a zamanin AI.

chat.title: Tattaunawa da Mai Filer
chat.subtitle: Biyan harajinka ta hanyar tattaunawa.
chat.placeholder: Tambayi Mai kome — payslip dinka, PIT, raguwa, matakan gaba…
chat.emptyHint: Gwada: "Ina samun ₦5,000,000 a shekara. Menene PIT na 2026?"

identity.title: Tabbatar da wanene kai
identity.subtitle: Muna duba NIN dinka tare da wani ma'aikaci mai lasisi kafin a shirya kowane fayil.
identity.ninHelper: Lambobi 11. Ba ma adana NIN dinka a sarari — kawai kwafi mai kariya tare da hash.
identity.nameLabel: Suna cikakke (yadda kake so ya kasance a rubuce)
identity.nameHelper: Muna kwatanta shi da rikodin NIN kuma muna nuna duk rashin daidaito don ka duba.
identity.consentBody: Na yarda Mai Filer ta duba rikodin NIMC na wannan NIN don tallafawa biyan harajina. Na fahimci cewa NIN dina za a adana shi da kariya kuma za a sanya rikodin izini.
identity.consentCheckbox: Na yarda kuma na bayar da izini.
identity.resultNotVerified: Ba mu iya tabbatar da wannan NIN ba
identity.nameMatchStrict: Sunan ya yi daidai da rikodin NIN daidai.
identity.nameMatchFuzzy: Sunan yana kusa da rikodin NIN.
identity.nameMatchMismatch: Sunan ba ya yi daidai da rikodin NIN ba. Sake duba kafin ka aika.

ngo.title: NGO annual return
ngo.subtitle: Record your exempt body's income, expenditure, and WHT remitted. Placeholder statutory rules apply; confirm before filing.
ngo.placeholderBanner: This form uses illustrative 2026 NRS rules pending owner confirmation. Do not file the pack until `ngo_rules.py` is replaced with confirmed values.
ngo.exemptionDeclaration: Trustees affirm the organisation continues to meet the tax-exempt criteria for this year.
ngo.signatoryDeclaration: Authorised signatory affirms this return is true and complete.

sme.title: SME calculators (preview)
sme.subtitle: Live CIT, WHT, and UBL 3.0 envelope validation against the placeholder statutory tables.
sme.placeholderBanner: Illustrative 2026 rules — the owner must supply confirmed NRS CIT bands, WHT rates, and the 55-field UBL list before this surface is used for real filings.
sme.ublHelp: Paste a full envelope JSON to validate against the 8-section / 55-field invariant.

dashboard.title: Dashboard dinka na Mai Filer
dashboard.subtitle: Tarihin haraji na shekara, sauye-sauye, da shawarwari a tsakiyar shekara.
dashboard.factsEmpty: Babu bayanai tukuna. Bayan ka aika (ko ka yi kwaikwayo) fayil, Mai za ta adana manyan lambobin nan.
dashboard.anomaliesEmpty: Ba a gano wani muhimmin canji a shekara zuwa shekara ba.
dashboard.nudgesEmpty: Babu abin da za a nuna yanzu. Dawo bayan albashi ko daftari na gaba.
